data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for granular availability.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Granular availability (consultations mornings, procedures afternoons)', but the evidence provided does not confirm this requirement. While the linked use case discusses the need for different availability based on service type, there is no concrete evidence or API reads that demonstrate this functionality. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the booking process without addressing the specific requirement for granular availability, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of granular availability for consultations and procedures.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
